revenue_recognition.policy: Primary performance obligation is IP license (brand, reservation systems, PMS) — considered series of distinct services transferred over time. Variable consideration (royalty fees) allocated to distinct services; fixed consideration (application/initiation fees) allocated based on estimated standalone selling prices. Royalty fees recognized as earned per contract terms using time as measure of progress. Sales/COO fees recognized over contract term. Termination fees recognized when received.

amortization_methods.policy: Franchise contracts (contract acquisition costs, acquired intangibles, costs to obtain) amortized straight-line over estimated useful life = contract term including sole-option extension periods, generally 10-20 years. Amortization begins on hotel opening date or contract execution date, whichever is later.

impairment_policy.policy: Evaluate carrying value for indicators of impairment; if indicators exist, compare expected undiscounted future cash flows to net carrying value. If not recoverable and exceeds fair value, recognize impairment loss allocated pro rata among assets.

income_tax_provision.policy: Entity is disregarded for US income tax purposes — all items of taxable income/expense included in Hilton's computation. No provision for US income taxes. Only foreign (territorial) taxes apply — variable rates by jurisdiction, some exempt under cross-jurisdictional relief. Franchisee responsible for withholding/remittance.

lease_accounting.policy: No lease accounting disclosed — entity does not appear to have operating or finance leases

fair_value_measurements.policy: Three-level hierarchy (Level 1/2/3). Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated to be equal to carrying values as of Dec 31, 2024 and 2023.

acquisitions.policy: Distinction between business combination and asset acquisition based on inputs/processes/outputs and concentration of fair value. Asset acquisitions: cost allocated to assets/liabilities based on relative fair values; no goodwill recognized.

acquisition.description: May 2024: acquired Graduate brand franchise contracts as part of Hilton's larger Graduate brand acquisition. Accounted as asset acquisition. Recorded ~$85M franchise contract intangible assets (15-year useful life). Activity not material to 2024 operating results.

franchise_contracts.description: Net carrying value $392.7M at Dec 31, 2024. Gross $468.6M less accumulated amortization $75.9M. Comprises: contract acquisition costs $306.2M net, Graduate intangible $82.0M net, costs to obtain $4.5M net.

franchise_deposits.description: Application/initiation fees collected at time of application recorded as current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues.

related_party_transactions.description: Intercompany balances from Hilton's centralized cash management (not controlled by entity). Franchise deposits held in lockbox with no entity access. $1.5B/$1.4B/$1.55B settled in 2024/2023/2022 with simultaneous distributions to parent. Operator agreement with affiliate — $0 compensation. Graduate acquisition paid by affiliate, recorded as short-term note (settled Feb 2024).

commitments_and_contingencies.description: ALL assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for Hilton's debt obligations (maturing 2025-2033). No guarantee liability recorded due to parent-subsidiary relationship. Litigation — expect no material adverse effect.

subsequent_events.description: Evaluated through March 18, 2025 (document states '2024' — appears to be typo). No material subsequent events disclosed.

advertising_fund_accounting.description: No separate advertising fund. Monthly Program Fee (3.5% GRR) is NOT a trust — covers advertising, marketing, reservation systems, quality assurance, technology, admin. Franchisor is not fiduciary. Per FDD Item 6 Note 2 and Item 11.
